allow: PowerShell($shell = New-Object -ComObject Shell.Application; $folder = $shell.Namespace\('C:\\Users\\User\\Desktop\\software\\rubkiancodeweb\\public\\videos\\project1'\); $file = $folder.ParseName\('moshipayment.mp4'\); 0..320 | ForEach-Object { $name = $folder.GetDetailsOf\($null, $_\); $val = $folder.GetDetailsOf\($file, $_\); if \($val\) { "$_ : $name = $val" } } | Select-String -Pattern 'frame|dimen|width|height|x')

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName PresentationCore; $uri = New-Object System.Uri\('C:\\Users\\User\\Desktop\\software\\rubkiancodeweb\\public\\videos\\project1\\moshipayment.mp4'\); $player = New-Object System.Windows.Media.MediaPlayer; $player.Open\($uri\); Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 1500; "Width=$\($player.NaturalVideoWidth\) Height=$\($player.NaturalVideoHeight\)"; $player.Close\(\))
